INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('abc=111, def=222, ghi=333');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('name=John, age=30, income=1500');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('error=404, message=Not Found, timestamp=2021-01-01');
CREATE TABLE subquery_test (id UInt32, description String);
INSERT INTO subquery_test VALUES (1, 'test=example; value=42;'), (2, 'foo=bar; nested=content;');
SELECT extractAllGroupsHorizontal(description, '([\w]+)=([\w]+)') FROM (SELECT description FROM subquery_test) AS sub;
INSERT INTO multi_level_test VALUES ('product_id=123; name=iPhone; price=999'), ('product_id=124; name=Galaxy; price=799');
SELECT extractAllGroupsHorizontal(data, '([\w]+)=([^;]+)') FROM (SELECT data FROM multi_level_test WHERE price < 900) AS filtered_data;
SELECT extractAllGroupsHorizontal(haystack, '([\w]+)=([\w]+)') FROM test_strings WHERE haystack LIKE '%=%';
SELECT * FROM (SELECT extractAllGroupsHorizontal(haystack, '([\w]+)=([\w]+)') AS matches FROM test_strings) AS final_matches;
